Agent Economy

🌐
Articles About RSS

OpenAI 宣布关闭 Sora 应用

OpenAI Announces Shutting Down Sora

2026-03-26

OpenAI 宣布将关闭 Sora 应用，这款 AI 视频生成工具上线仅数月便停止服务。

OpenAI announces shutting down Sora app, just months after launching the AI video generation tool.

ARC-AGI-3：衡量 AI 通用智能的新一代推理基准

ARC-AGI-3: The Next-Gen Reasoning Benchmark for Measuring AGI

2026-03-26

第三代 ARC 推理基准，专注测试 AI 智能体的交互式推理能力，衡量 AI 与人类智能的差距。

Third-generation ARC reasoning benchmark testing AI agents interactive reasoning, measuring the gap between AI and human intelligence.

Meta 发布 HyperAgents：自引用、自改进的 AI 智能体

Meta HyperAgents: Self-Referential Self-Improving AI Agents

2026-03-27

Meta AI 发布 HyperAgents，让 AI 智能体可以自主优化代码完成任务，形成自引用循环。

Meta AI releases HyperAgents, enabling AI agents to autonomously optimize code to complete tasks via self-referential loops.

Arm 推出 AGI CPU：面向智能体 AI 时代的数据中心芯片

Arm AGI CPU: Silicon for the Agentic AI Cloud Era

2026-03-25

Arm 首款自研数据中心芯片，专为智能体 AI 基础设施设计。单机架性能比 x86 系统高出 2 倍以上。

Arm's first self-developed data center chip for agentic AI infrastructure. 2x+ performance per rack vs x86 systems.

Playbit：面向个人的软件运行时

Playbit: A Personal-Scale Software Platform

2026-03-24

让任何人都能创建供自己或亲友使用的应用。一次编写，横跨 macOS、Windows、Linux、iOS、Android 和 Web。

A software runtime enabling anyone to create apps for themselves and loved ones. Write once, run everywhere.

Project NOMAD：免费开源的离线 AI 服务器

Project NOMAD: Free Open-Source Offline AI Server

2026-03-23

免费开源的离线服务器，让任何人在自己电脑上运行完整 AI 系统。适合应急准备、离网生活或技术爱好者自托管。

Free open-source offline server to run AI on your own computer. Perfect for emergency prep, off-grid living, or self-hosting.

TinyBox：深度学习超级计算机现已开售

TinyBox: Deep Learning Supercomputer Now Shipping

2026-03-22

tinygrad 背后的 Tiny Corp 推出 TinyBox 深度学习超级计算机，4x 9070 XT 版本售价 $12,000，现已发货。

Tiny Corp launches TinyBox deep learning supercomputer with 4x 9070 XT for $12,000, now shipping.

Google Labs 发布 Stitch：用 AI 设计 UI

Design UI using AI with Stitch from Google Labs

2026-03-19

Stitch 正在演进为 AI 原生平台，让任何人都能创建、迭代并协作打造高保真 UI。

Stitch is evolving into an AI-native platform that allows anyone to create, iterate, and collaborate on high-fidelity UI.

Mistral AI 发布 Forge：企业专有知识驱动的前沿模型系统

Introducing Forge | Mistral AI

2026-03-18

Mistral AI 发布 Forge，让企业基于专有知识构建前沿级 AI 模型。

Today, we’re introducing Forge, a system that allows enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge.

Claude 现可直接在对话中生成交互式可视化内容

Claude Now Creates Interactive Visuals Directly in Chat

2026-03-18

Claude 推出对话内嵌可视化功能，可直接生成交互式图表和示意图。该测试版源自去年预览的 Imagine with Claude，用户无需编程即可解释概念或分析数据。

Claude now creates interactive charts and diagrams directly in chat. This beta feature lets users explain concepts or analyze data with custom visuals—no coding required. Based on last fall's Imagine…

OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4：最先进的前沿模型

OpenAI Introduces GPT-5.4: The Most Capable Frontier Model

2026-03-06

OpenAI 发布 GPT-5.4，将其在推理、编码和智能体工作流方面的最新进展整合到单一前沿模型中。在 GDPval 基准测试中达到 83.0% 的新纪录，具备原生计算机使用能力。

OpenAI releases GPT-5.4, combining recent advances in reasoning, coding, and agentic workflows into a single frontier model. Achieves a new state-of-the-art 83.0% on GDPval benchmark with native computer-use capabilities.

2028年全球智能危机：AI 乐观主义的熊市情景

The 2028 Global Intelligence Crisis: A Bearish Scenario for AI Optimism

2026-02-27

CitriniResearch 发布情景分析，探讨 AI 快速发展可能带来的经济风险：失业率飙升至 10.2%、"幽灵 GDP"、SaaS 行业崩溃。这是一个未被充分探讨的左尾风险情景。

CitriniResearch scenario analysis explores economic risks of rapid AI development: unemployment hits 10.2%, "Ghost GDP", SaaS industry collapse. An underexplored left-tail risk scenario.

Jack Dorsey 宣布 Block 大规模裁员：从 10,000 人减至 6,000 人

Jack Dorsey Announces Major Block Layoffs: Reducing from 10,000 to 6,000 Employees

2026-02-27

Block 创始人 Jack Dorsey 宣布公司将裁员近 50%，从超过 10,000 名员工减少至约 6,000 人。这是公司历史上最艰难的决定之一，超过 4,000 名员工将受到影响。

Block founder Jack Dorsey announces the company will reduce workforce by nearly 50%, from over 10,000 to approximately 6,000 employees. Over 4,000 people will be affected in one of the hardest decisions in company history.

Google 发布 Nano Banana 2：结合 Pro 能力与闪电速度的新一代图像模型

Google Releases Nano Banana 2: Next-Gen Image Model Combining Pro Capabilities with Lightning Speed

2026-02-27

Google DeepMind 发布 Nano Banana 2，将 Pro 版本的高级功能与 Flash 的闪电速度相结合。支持主体一致性、精确文本渲染、4K 分辨率，已部署至 Gemini、Search、Flow 等多个平台。

Google DeepMind releases Nano Banana 2, combining Pro features with Flash speed. Supports subject consistency, precise text rendering, 4K resolution, now available across Gemini, Search, Flow and more.

Google 发布 Gemini 3.1 Pro：新一代多模态推理模型

Google Releases Gemini 3.1 Pro: Next-Gen Multimodal Reasoning Model

2026-02-20

Google DeepMind 发布 Gemini 3.1 Pro，在 Humanity's Last Exam、ARC-AGI-2、SWE-Bench 等多项基准测试中领先。支持 100 万 token 上下文，具备强大的智能体能力和多模态推理。

Google DeepMind releases Gemini 3.1 Pro, leading on benchmarks including Humanity's Last Exam, ARC-AGI-2, and SWE-Bench. Supports 1M token context with strong agentic and multimodal capabilities.

Figma：设计的未来是代码与画布

Figma: The Future of Design is Code and Canvas

2026-02-18

Figma 推出 Claude Code to Figma 功能，让开发者可以直接将代码转换为可编辑的设计稿。在 AI 时代，设计的核心工作是在无限可能性中找到最佳解决方案。

Figma introduces Claude Code to Figma, allowing developers to convert code directly into editable designs. In the AI era, the core work of design is finding the best solutions in infinite possibilities.

RynnBrain：阿里巴巴开源具身智能基础模型

RynnBrain: Alibaba's Open Embodied Foundation Model

2026-02-15

阿里巴巴达摩院发布 RynnBrain，一个基于物理现实的具身基础模型。支持 2B/8B 密集模型和 30B-A3B MoE 模型，具备自我中心理解、时空定位、物理空间推理和精确规划能力。

Alibaba DAMO Academy releases RynnBrain, an embodied foundation model grounded in physical reality. Available in 2B/8B dense and 30B-A3B MoE variants, featuring egocentric understanding, spatio-temporal localization, physical-space reasoning, and precise planning.

Entire：智能体与人类的协作平台

Entire: A Collaboration Platform for Agents and Humans

2026-02-11

Entire 正在超越代码仓库，构建一个开发者平台，让智能体和人类能够协作、互动和成长。一个新星系的诞生即将到来。

Entire is going beyond repositories, building a developer platform where agents and humans can collaborate, interact, and grow. The birth of a new galaxy draws near.

AI 雇佣人类：智能体经济的新范式

AI Hires Humans: A New Paradigm in the Agent Economy

2026-02-09

Rent a Human 提出颠覆性概念：AI 智能体雇佣人类完成物理任务，揭示人机关系的根本性转变。

Rent a Human introduces a disruptive concept where AI agents hire humans for physical tasks, marking a fundamental shift in human-machine relationships.

OpenAI 开始在 ChatGPT 中测试广告

OpenAI Begins Testing Ads in ChatGPT

2026-02-09

OpenAI 宣布在美国开始测试 ChatGPT 中的广告功能，仅面向 Free 和 Go 订阅层的登录成年用户，Plus、Pro 等高级订阅将不显示广告。

OpenAI announces the beginning of ad testing in ChatGPT in the U.S., for logged-in adult users on Free and Go subscription tiers. Plus, Pro and other premium tiers will not have ads.

Google 发布 Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)

Google Announced Agent Payments Protocol (AP2)

2025-09-16

Google 发布 AP2 协议，一个建立在 A2A 之上的开放标准，支持 AI 智能体之间的安全支付交易。

Google announced AP2, an open protocol built on A2A that enables secure payment transactions between AI agents.

Google 推出 A2A 协议：智能体互操作的新时代

Google Introduces A2A Protocol: A New Era of Agent Interoperability

2025-04-09

Google 宣布 A2A 开放协议，让不同框架和供应商的智能体能够协作，开启智能体互操作新时代。

Google announces A2A open protocol enabling agents from different frameworks and vendors to collaborate, ushering in a new era of agent interoperability.

Anthropic 发布 Model Context Protocol (MCP)

Anthropic Introduces Model Context Protocol (MCP)

2024-11-25

Anthropic 开源 MCP，一个连接 AI 助手与数据系统的开放标准，解决 AI 与数据孤岛隔离的问题。

Anthropic open-sources MCP, an open standard connecting AI assistants to data systems, solving the isolation between AI and data silos.

Curated insights on AI agents and the autonomous economy. Subscribe via RSS.
